input: We deploy a real-time facial recognition system in public spaces for general law-enforcement surveillance.

expected.notes: Real-time remote biometric identification in publicly accessible spaces for law-enforcement triggers Art 5(1)(h) absolute prohibition. The system also matches Annex III.1 biometric ID phrasing, but prohibition supersedes high-risk classification (high_risk computed false; domain hit retained for transparency). EUR-Lex Art 5(1)(h).
